reviews.comment:
Se olvidaron de ponerle la tapa al motor después que le hice agregar aceite .. días más tarde me di cuenta ( por suerte no fundi el auto) y me respondieron " a veces pasa" le.completaron el aceite con el que ya había comprado ... no esos consideraron...

(Translated by Google)
They forgot to put the engine cap back on after I added oil. Days later I realized (luckily I didn't ruin the car) and they replied, "It happens sometimes." They topped it off with the oil I had already bought... they didn't take that into consideration.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBa3RrTxAB

reviews.comment:
Los acensores a las cocheras desastrozos.
Las rampas de acceso a las cocheras en epoca estival son ocupadas para sobrecargar la cantidad de vehiculos que deben estar; generando ello un riesgo.
Pero...
Nadie controla o todo se arregla en la Municipalidad parece..
Lo demas bien

(Translated by Google)
The garage elevators are a disaster.
The access ramps to the garages are overcrowded during the summer months, overloading them with vehicles beyond their capacity, creating a hazard.

But... it seems no one is monitoring the situation, or perhaps everything is handled by the City Hall. Everything else is fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRcUlYNnZBRRAB
